Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class ContentFolderLink

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.ContentFolderLink
public class ContentFolderLink extends SObject

Java class for ContentFolderLink complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ContentFolderLink">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="ContentFolder" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ContentFolder" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContentFolderId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EnableFolderStatus" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ParentEntityId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
